props.name: stateText
props.type: { closed: ReactNode; open: ReactNode } on Trigger; null, false, or empty active content suppresses output

nativePolicy: The trigger remains a native button with aria-expanded and aria-controls supplied by React Aria.
Content uses disclosure semantics without adding an inappropriate accordion, heading, or tab structure.
Disabled state prevents native activation while preserving an understandable control.

Trigger stateText optionally renders visible localized state context; omitting it or resolving the active value to null, false, or empty content removes that copy and its presentation output while aria-expanded remains authoritative.
